channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18808] Allow LNDs to discover custom metadata via pings
item.description:
The EFA LND needs to be able to automatically discover remote EFA NIs GID and manager QP data by first performing a handshake using LNET pings over TCP. This allows EFA to resolve hardware addresses without relying large NID support and without needing the GID to be provided externally.

The metadata for all remote NIs for a particular node are passed via the LNET ping REPLY packet. Since a node will only send its own NIs metadata, a handshake must be performed with each node in a cluster.

We define a new LNET callback lnd_get_nid_metadata to enable LNet to query the LND for NID related metadata to send alongside the ping REPLY. Of course, this is implemented by the EFA LND to transmit the GIDs and manager QP data for local NIs.
item.summary: Allow LNDs to discover custom metadata via pings

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: should be resolved by patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61252

It looks so, on Ubuntu client it is similar in other failures:

https://testing.whamcloud.com/search?end_date=2025-09-12&source=sub_tests&start_date=2025-09-06&status=FAIL&sub_test_script_id=d8881e24-80d2-4340-bc9b-ad64a26c0440&test_set_script_id=a2b1c4b2-b449-11e9-b88c-52540065bddc#redirect

filter reports by client distro as Ubuntu 24.04 and check client dmesg.
Thanks for the heads up - I'll take a look. Is this consistently failing on that test?

please pay attention to the following :

https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/a74c6eb4-b216-4034-a8f7-d5ceb2bb659f

[16859.512403] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lnetctl ping 10.240.42.236@tcp
[16859.516728] Ping reply received with mapping:
[16859.517351] ------------[ cut here ]------------
[16859.518025] UBSAN: array-index-out-of-bounds in /var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-reviews/arch/x86_64/build_type/client/distro/ubuntu2404/ib_stack/inkernel/BUILD/lustre-2.16.58_23_gd6c1607/debian/tmp/modules-deb/usr_src/modules/lustre/lnet/lnet/api-ni.c:10492:4
[16859.520611] index 0 is out of range for type 'lnet_nid_md_entry [*]'
[16859.521444] CPU: 1 PID: 911342 Comm: lnetctl Kdump: loaded Tainted: G        W  OE      6.8.0-62-generic #65-Ubuntu
[16859.522675] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
[16859.523407] Call Trace:
[16859.523809]  <TASK>
[16859.524168]  dump_stack_lvl+0x76/0xa0

[16859.550078] Code: 15 19 6e 0d 00 f7 d8 64 89 02 b8 ff ff ff ff eb bf 0f 1f 44 00 00 f3 0f 1e fa 80 3d 45 f0 0d 00 00 74 13 b8 2e 00 00 00 0f 05 <48> 3d 00 f0 ff ff 77 4c c3 0f 1f 00 55 48 89 e5 48 83 ec 20 89 55
[16859.552157] RSP: 002b:00007ffe5ea55ba8 EFLAGS: 00000202 ORIG_RAX: 000000000000002e
[16859.553090] RAX: ffffffffffffffda RBX: 000059a19fa04390 RCX: 00007d2a3292c004

[16859.554856] RBP: 00007ffe5ea55bd0 R08: 0000000000000000 R09: 0000000000000007
[16859.555736] R10: 00007d2a32b96110 R11: 0000000000000202 R12: 000059a19fa32440
[16859.556611] R13: 000059a19fa042a0 R14: 00007ffe5ea55be0 R15: 000059a19fa36e5a
[16859.557483]  </TASK>
[16859.557891] ---[ end trace ]---
[16859.558366] found metadata reply NI[10.240.42.236@tcp]
[16859.559068] ec 2a f0 0a 00 00 02 00 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a
[16859.559806] 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a
[16859.560523] 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a 5a

it refers to lnet_discover_nid_metadata() added under this ticket

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58407/
Subject: LU-18808 lnet: allow LNDs to discover metadata via pings
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 124bc53a970f0ee63e3bc782674ee40748f8ed78

"Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58407
Subject: LU-18808 lnet: allow LNDs to discover metadata via pings
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 1c58c9e0e1fe0fcdff34a2d5ce9c1ec4116a658b
